commands.author: jincheng-xydt

target.title: [Bug]: claude-cli out-of-credits error bypasses model fallback chain — error text delivered as final response
target.body:
### Bug type

Behavior bug (incorrect output/state without crash)

### Beta release blocker

No

### Summary

When claude-cli/claude-sonnet-4-6 is the primary model and the underlying Claude Code subscription has exhausted its credits, the configured fallback chain is never attempted — the CLI's error text is delivered to the user as the final assistant response.

### Steps to reproduce

1. Configure openclaw.json with claude-cli/claude-sonnet-4-6 as primary and any non-cli fallbacks (e.g. ollama/gemma4:12b, openrouter/google/gemini-2.5-flash).
2. Exhaust Claude Code subscription credits — confirmed state: "cachedExtraUsageDisabledReason": "out_of_credits" present in ~/.claude.json.
3. Send any message to the agent.
4. Observe the response is ⚠️ Something went wrong while processing your request. Please try again, or use /new to start a fresh session. — no fallback model is tried.

### Expected behavior

When the claude-cli primary model fails (for any reason including credit exhaustion), the agent attempts the configured fallback models in order before surfacing a failure to the user.

### Actual behavior

The ⚠️ Something went wrong while processing your request. Please try again, or use /new to start a fresh session. text — which is the Claude CLI subprocess's own error output — is delivered as the final response. No fallback model is attempted. The session trajectory file is never written (the .trajectory-path.json pointer is created but the .trajectory.jsonl it references does not exist), confirming the failure occurs before any trajectory capture.

### OpenClaw version

2026.6.5

### Operating system

macOS 25.5.0 (Darwin arm64)

### Install method

Homebrew (/opt/homebrew/bin/openclaw → /opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/openclaw/)

### Model

claude-cli/claude-sonnet-4-6

### Provider / routing chain

openclaw → claude-cli subprocess → Claude Code API

### Additional provider/model setup details

"model": {
  "primary": "claude-cli/claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "fallbacks": [
    "ollama/gemma4:12b",
    "ollama/qwen3.6:latest",
    "ollama/gemma4:26b",
    "openrouter/google/gemini-2.5-flash",
    "openrouter/meta-llama/llama-3.3-70b-instruct"
  ]
}

### Logs, screenshots, and evidence

```shell
~/.claude.json 
"cachedExtraUsageDisabledReason": "out_of_credits"

Session file (aa305c0e-bc20-4065-9796-9a7eed31c085.jsonl) — last two entries:
user message at 2026-06-21T04:46:42.994Z — "lets revisit the skill..."
user message at 2026-06-21T04:47:12.503Z — (duplicate, retried)
[no assistant response recorded]

Missing trajectory file:
EXISTS:   aa305c0e-bc20-4065-9796-9a7eed31c085.trajectory-path.json
MISSING:  aa305c0e-bc20-4065-9796-9a7eed31c085.trajectory.jsonl

Root cause traced to result-fallback-classifier-CgsLfRqx.js:
// The classifier returns null (no fallback) when there is visible output.
// claude-cli delivers its error text as a regular visible text payload,
// so hasVisibleAgentPayload() returns true and short-circuits the check.

if (hasVisibleAgentPayload(params.result, {
    includeErrorPayloads: false,
    includeReasoningPayloads: false
})) return null;  // ← fallback never reached

// The billing/auth pattern check only applies to payloads where isError === true.
// The claude-cli subprocess error text arrives as a normal text payload (isError: false),
// so classifyBusinessDenialErrorPayloadReason() never sees it.
const errorText = payloads
    .filter((payload) => payload?.isError === true)
    .map(...)
    .join("\n");

The constant GENERIC_EXTERNAL_RUN_FAILURE_TEXT ("⚠️ Something went wrong while processing your request. Please try again, or use /new to start a fresh session.") is defined in agent-runner-failure-copy-D7KZsRTJ.js and is already used for heartbeat detection — but is not checked in the fallback classifier path.
```

### Impact and severity

- Affected: Any user with claude-cli as the primary model whose Claude Code subscription credit is exhausted
- Severity: High — the entire fallback chain is silently bypassed; the agent becomes unresponsive regardless of how many healthy fallback providers are configured
- Frequency: 100% reproducible while cachedExtraUsageDisabledReason: "out_of_credits" is set
- Consequence: User must manually edit openclaw.json to swap the primary model to restore agent functionality; the fallback system provides no resilience for this failure mode

### Additional information

Suggested fix (two options):

Option A — In the claude-cli backend, detect when subprocess output exactly matches GENERIC_EXTERNAL_RUN_FAILURE_TEXT and return an empty result or a payload with isError: true, so the existing fallback classification path can handle it.

Option B — In classifyEmbeddedAgentRunResultForModelFallback, add a pre-check: if the sole visible payload text matches isGenericExternalRunFailureText() (already exported from agent-runner-failure-copy-D7KZsRTJ.js), treat it as an empty result and return a fallback classification.

Workaround until fixed: Move claude-cli/claude-sonnet-4-6 to the end of the fallback list and promote a direct-API model to primary in openclaw.json.
